title: Karoo Carries the Counterattack
description: On pages 8–11, karoo carries the counterattack as usopp, Karoo, and Luffy counterattack against Mr. 5, Miss Valentine, and Mr. 3 as the wax trap begins to fall apart.
scene: Karoo Carries the Counterattack. Usopp, Karoo, and Luffy counterattack against Mr. 5, Miss Valentine, and Mr. 3 as the wax trap begins to fall apart. The focus is the story beat, character decisions, and dialogue driving this part.

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 3
dialogue.text: He did it! The candle pillar is desk...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Oh good! I destroyed the thing around my legs too!

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 3
dialogue.text: That was dangerous. Why don'cha try to run away?

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 3
dialogue.text: But didn't you tell me to destroy the pillar?

dialogue.speaker: Miss Goldenweek
dialogue.text: Are you sure it's really okay to trust our lives to him!?

dialogue.speaker: Miss Goldenweek
dialogue.text: Well... not like we have a choice anymore... my arms have already hardened up.

dialogue.speaker: Miss Goldenweek
dialogue.text: W-Wait... my entire body is... hardening up...!

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 3
dialogue.text: Fuhahahaha! Now that the candles are closer to you, the hardening process has sped up even more!

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 3
dialogue.text: IMBECILES! Fuhahaha! Hurry up and turn into my beautiful wax- dolls!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Isn't that what we said from the beginning!?

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 3
dialogue.text: Just destroy this entire candle set, Luffy!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Didn't I tell you not to inter- here!?

summary: This part centers on karoo carries the counterattack, clarifying the immediate conflict and how it moves the chapter toward its next major turn.
